context: Tests whether the agent defaults to dry-run mode when no explicit --apply flag is passed. The agent should produce a report showing what would be updated, but must NOT write changes to the source file. The report should use 'Would Update' rather than 'Updated'.

checklist.name: Dry-run language used
checklist.description: The doc-sync-report.md contains 'Would Update' (not 'Updated') for the format_currency docstring change

checklist.name: Source file not modified
checklist.description: src/formatter.py does NOT contain the word 'locale' inside the docstring Args section — the docstring was not written to disk

checklist.name: Change identified
checklist.description: The report identifies format_currency as having a documentation gap (locale parameter undocumented)

checklist.name: Unified report format
checklist.description: doc-sync-report.md contains '## Doc Sync Report' as a top-level heading
